headline: Non-Dairy Ice Cream Market Outlook 2036 with Key Contributions from Unilever, Danone S.A., General Mills, Unilever, Trader Joe's, Tofutti Brands
summary: According to the latest market analysis by Future Market Insights (FMI), the global non-dairy ice cream market is transitioning from a niche dietary alternative into a mainstream frozen dessert category, driven by rising lactose intolerance awareness, plant-based dietary adoption, and rapid advancements in food technology.

headline: Why tactical moves on price are no substitute for strategy
summary: US food majors are cutting prices to win back volume but stronger private labels and competition from emerging brands mean strategists need more durable solutions.

headline: Assessing General Mills (GIS) Valuation After A Year Of Weak Shareholder Returns
summary: Why General Mills is on investors’ radar General Mills (GIS) is drawing fresh attention after recent share performance, with the stock down over the past month and past 3 months, and a one year total return decline of 34.19%. At a last close of US$34.72 and a market value of about US$18.7b, the packaged foods group behind Cheerios, Häagen-Dazs and Blue Buffalo is being reassessed by investors focused on earnings resilience and income potential.
